name: Mecard Ball
overview: Basketball, Baseball, Soccer… When it comes to handling a ball, Cha Youngwoong, a fifth-grade elementary school student, exhibits overwhelming abilities. One day, while cleaning out the warehouse at the request of his mother, he discovers a mysterious marble. At that moment, the villain duo "Team MABORI" and the monster creature 'Pachyla' appear to break the warehouse and threaten the hero, but With the help of the Mechanimal 'Akan' hidden in the warehouse, he uses a mysterious orb - 'Mecard Ball' to succeed in defeating them.

trailers.title: 새로운 메카드 시리즈가 왔다! 매주 화요일 오후 6시 메카드볼
[메카드볼] 새로운 모험! 새로운 배틀이 온다! - 메카드볼 SPOT
